name: Muhammad Arif bin Fazil
description: F13 SOVEREIGN — absolute veto holder, 888_JUDGE, human architect of arifOS Federation. This card is the cryptographic anchor for autonomous sovereign identity verification. All federation authority derives from this identity. Not an agent — a human sovereign whose identity is cryptographically verifiable through did:web:arif-fazil.com.
federation_loop: 000 (sovereign) → arifOS kernel (verify nonce+signature) → AAA gateway (route) → VAULT999 (seal)
nonce_flow: arif_init → kernel issues nonce → sovereign signs with omega_private.key → kernel verifies against did:web:arif-fazil.com#arif-fazil → actor_verified=true → authority=FULL → mutation_allowed=true → seal_allowed=true

seals.seq_63: SOVEREIGN autonomous identity sealed. Cryptographic anchor live.

civilizational_frame: Human sovereign. Architect. Geoscientist. Father. The bottleneck shifted from body to mind. Clarity is the new literacy.
kanon: DITEMPA BUKAN DIBERI — Sovereignty is forged, not assumed.
